title: ColorBricks16
description: Add 16 different types of stained bricks.
body:
# ColorBricks16

![ColorBrick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/2426716f09bef499472e63bf580dd74e214b3ede.png)

The mod allows you to create clay, brick blocks, concrete brick blocks, terracotta brick blocks, and glass brick blocks for the default 16 dyes. You can also create slabs, vertical slabs, flowerpots, stairs, walls, buttons, pressure plates, and tiles. (Flowerpots are only available for brick blocks.)
The design is the same as the default one.


## Manufacturable Blocks

- gradation color bricks

  ![ColorBrick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/4d4423f87855b1da14b701ce170db86de3a44470.png)

- color concrete blocks

  ![ColorBrick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/623c7ab4289dcec30e44e1971b2fa909c7f66fa8.png)

- color concrete brick blocks

  ![ColorBrick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/ab3b9fd8bfb7fc490c5067ce1ce9a9561aa26b52.png)

- gradation concrete bricks

  ![ColorBrick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/4301b443ca55771a601c272b153b7dec64a4c309.png)

- color terracotta blocks

  ![ColorBrick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/ed52b0975774cfd850a4655185f99befc43e3248.png)
 
- color terracotta brick blocks

  ![ColorBrick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/1389d77071ea55b3ff0788d6a5925502fb19ecbd.png)

- gradation terracotta bricks

  ![ColorBrick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/9f248b275bf25f441d3ee239b2689a17b0ee8dba.png)
 
- color glass blocks

  ![ColorBrick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/2d8f488e1400556673358e24a21cd4d3e33251ee.png)
 
- color glass bricks

  ![ColorBrick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/83ac2e6d8f33ee45c1b1a28df5d11e71d705fc37.png)

- Comparison of brick blocks

  ![ColorBrick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/3900ec94044feeb9e271f1299f8f3b1ac9c4b47d.png)
From bottom to top: color bricks, color concrete bricks, color terracotta bricks, color glass bricks

- Comparison of tile and pressure plates.

  ![ColorBrick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/5569d8446ecd680af44caa41606f74c9a2ea37df.png)
The tiles have similar properties to snow, and they cannot be retrieved with bare hands and require a pickaxe.

- Stacked tiles.

  ![ColorBricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/25bf83f2675a50e7245b9bf911ec46f2da41e5de.png)
Tiles can now be freely stacked 16 high. It can be stacked vertically as well as horizontally.　

  - Right-click to place it on the clicked surface.
  - Shift+right-click on a horizontal plane to place it vertically.
  - Shift+right-click on a vertical plane to place it horizontally.
  - Shift+Ctrl+right-click on a vertical plane to place it in the opposite direction.

## Recipe Example

- example1: color clay
  
  ![ex1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/1749cb45b15ec010b1a48fb4b6b69751a5839401.png)

- example2: color brick
  
  ![ex2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/ffe8ceaaab6419b20ce57d41aa3572678cf81e25.png)

- example3: color brick block

  ![ex3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/c1ce0cf769d64337dd0502affd30134fc8726a24.png)

- example4: Stone cutting recipe that can be created with color brick blocks
  
  ![ex4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/c1e6e76a09f4eec6e8837ce159cb858fc3303a3e.png)

- example5: color concrete brick block
  
  ![ex5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/be2458dc1ea66e57d90e41a1694d6cd0714881cf.png)

- example6: color terracotta brick block
  
  ![ex6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/3877b9fe0f97084792c4be21bb2db967e5adc0dd.png)

- example7: gradation brick block
  
  ![ex7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/a832fc78b5dbef876b853ae9c2a61319938e79bf.png)

- example8: tile
  
  ![ex8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/302638fca0a620259941cbdafae3fe7f78be2891.png)
  ![ex8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/9ec8b3475f9ae35ee48f519d1d1d1fbcedc5c156.png)

- example9: vertical slab

  ![ex9](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hSlOB3Wd/images/c85e8059c42ba85d7c2a5771b9746ff3d8e6a90e.png)

## Future implementation plans

- Implemented textures for default stone bricks, cracked bricks, mossy bricks, and chests.  
  - [ ] color brick block  
  - [ ] color concrete brick block
  - [ ] color terracotta brick block
- Implement sooty texture.  
  - [ ] color brick block  
  - [ ] color concrete brick block
  - [ ] color terracotta brick block
- Implement textures with different shades in parts.  (Implemented in 1.2.0)
  - [x] color brick block  
  - [x] color concrete brick block
  - [x] color terracotta brick block
